tagline: Turn urgency into a playable escape.

designSystem.style: High-energy action game UI with warm flame-orange primary palette, deep charcoal dark mode, bold typography, glowing CTAs, and mission-card layouts. Combines productivity urgency with adrenaline game aesthetics.

screens: Home - Dashboard with streak banner, critical mission alert, and today's mission list
Missions - Task-to-mission converter with urgency-grouped list and add-task form
Play - Interactive escape run with countdown timer, action button, combo scoring, and visual runner track
Rewards - XP progress, weekly streak calendar, badge grid, and completed mission history
Settings - Theme toggle (light/dark), sound/haptics/gameplay toggles, and profile card
features: Light and dark theme with flame-orange accent palette
Interactive game session with real countdown timer
Combo multiplier system on ACTION button presses
Task-to-mission conversion form with urgency/time selection
Post-mission debrief with XP calculation and next-step prompt
Floating Action Button (FAB) Play tab with elevated glow
Dynamic Island notch and realistic status bar
